title: Smoky Beef Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful stir fry with smoky beef, vegetables, and argentinian spices.

ingredients.name: Argentinian Stir Fry Spice Mix
ingredients.notes: Available in most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Optional, or substitute with gluten-free alternative

instructions: 1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
4. Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
5. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the Argentinian stir fry spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
7. Return the beef to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce (if using).
8. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the beef is cooked to desired doneness.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
